programme.title: Leprechaun 2
programme.desc: A leprechaun (Warwick Davis) surfaces in Los Angeles to claim a bride, as his previous object of affection was denied to him a thousand years before in Ireland. He kidnaps teenager Bridget (Shevonne Durkin), grotesquely murdering anyone who gets in his way. It falls to Bridget's boyfriend, Cody (Charlie Heath), to rescue her. Cody enlists the aid of his perpetually tipsy uncle, Morty (Sandy Baron), who decides to go after the homicidal leprechaun's pot of gold.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Paranormal researcher Abby Yates and physicist Erin Gilbert are trying to prove that ghosts exist in modern society. When strange apparitions appear in Manhattan, Gilbert and Yates turn to engineer Jillian Holtzmann for help. Also joining the team is Patty Tolan, a lifelong New Yorker who knows the city inside and out. Armed with proton packs and plenty of attitude, the four women prepare for an epic battle as more than 1,000 mischievous ghouls descend on Times Square.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Dredd
programme.desc: Mega City One is a vast, violent metropolis where felons rule the streets. The only law lies with cops called "judges," who act as judge, jury and executioner, and Dredd (Karl Urban) is one of the city's most feared. One day, Dredd is partnered with Cassandra (Olivia Thirlby), a rookie with powerful psychic abilities. A report of a terrible crime sends Dredd and Cassandra to a dangerous area controlled by Ma-Ma (Lena Headey), a drug lord who will stop at nothing to protect her empire.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Paranormal researcher Abby Yates and physicist Erin Gilbert are trying to prove that ghosts exist in modern society. When strange apparitions appear in Manhattan, Gilbert and Yates turn to engineer Jillian Holtzmann for help. Also joining the team is Patty Tolan, a lifelong New Yorker who knows the city inside and out. Armed with proton packs and plenty of attitude, the four women prepare for an epic battle as more than 1,000 mischievous ghouls descend on Times Square.

programme.title: Night of the Wild
programme.desc: Dogs go on a deadly rampage after a large meteor strikes a quiet town.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A timid man (Burgess Meredith) acquires superhuman strength; with Don Rickles.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An aged recluse hides in her home fearing the arrival of death. With Robert Redford.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Two men try to make their fortune at Las Vegas from the power one of them has to move inanimate objects.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A down-and-out man steals the fancy shoes from the body of a murdered gangster and finds himself living in the dead man's footsteps.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A passenger on board a wartime freighter has a premonition that the ship will be sunk by a Nazi submarine at 1:15 a.m., but no one believes him.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.sub-title: Nervous Man in a Four-Dollar Room
programme.desc: A small-time thief sees a new reflection of himself in a mirror.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Timid bank clerk Victor Pool discovers that a coin that lands on its edge as he pays for a paper leaves him with the power to read minds.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Morlocks
programme.desc: An experimental time machine opens a portal to the future, and mutated monsters use it to go on a murderous rampage in the present.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dredd
programme.desc: Mega City One is a vast, violent metropolis where felons rule the streets. The only law lies with cops called "judges," who act as judge, jury and executioner, and Dredd (Karl Urban) is one of the city's most feared. One day, Dredd is partnered with Cassandra (Olivia Thirlby), a rookie with powerful psychic abilities. A report of a terrible crime sends Dredd and Cassandra to a dangerous area controlled by Ma-Ma (Lena Headey), a drug lord who will stop at nothing to protect her empire.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: The Turning
programme.desc: Kate Mandell takes a job as a nanny for two young orphans at an isolated Gothic mansion in the Maine countryside. She soon learns that the children -- Miles and Flora -- are emotionally distant and unstable. When strange events start to plague Kate and the siblings, she begins to suspect that the estate's dark corridors are home to a malevolent entity.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Paranormal researcher Abby Yates and physicist Erin Gilbert are trying to prove that ghosts exist in modern society. When strange apparitions appear in Manhattan, Gilbert and Yates turn to engineer Jillian Holtzmann for help. Also joining the team is Patty Tolan, a lifelong New Yorker who knows the city inside and out. Armed with proton packs and plenty of attitude, the four women prepare for an epic battle as more than 1,000 mischievous ghouls descend on Times Square.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The Hunt
programme.desc: Twelve strangers wake up in a clearing. They don't know where they are, or how they got there. In the shadow of a dark internet conspiracy theory, ruthless elitists gather at a remote location to hunt humans for sport. But their master plan is about to be derailed when one of the hunted, Crystal, turns the tables on her pursuers.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Blade
programme.desc: A half-mortal, half-immortal is out to avenge his mother's death and rid the world of vampires. The modern-day technologically advanced vampires he is going after are in search of his special blood type needed to summon an evil god who plays a key role in their plan to execute the human race.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Blade II
programme.desc: Exploding from the pages of Marvel Comics comes the thrilling follow-up to the blockbuster "Blade." Half Man ... half vampire, and consumed by a desire to avenge the curse of his birth and save the human race from a blood-drenched Armageddon. In this newest action-packed adventure, Blade (Wesley Snipes) is forced to team up with the very vampires he hates in order to overcome a new type of monster which threatens to eradicate both races.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Blade: Trinity
programme.desc: The war between humans and vampires continues, but the humans' best hope, human-vampire hybrid warrior Blade (Wesley Snipes), has been framed for countless murders, turning popular sentiment against him. The vampire leader responsible for Blade's bad publicity is Danica Talos (Parker Posey), who's determined to finally lead her bloodthirsty compatriots to victory. Now Blade must team up with a band of rogue vampire hunters (Ryan Reynolds, Jessica Biel) to save humanity.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A lovesick man finds unexpected results when he buys a potion from a stranger to help woo the woman he desires.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A downed bomber pilot crash-lands in the desert; when he regains consciousness he can not find any of his crew members.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A wax-museum employee (Martin Balsam) moves the figures of several notorious murderers into the basement of his home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A distinguished but aging actor is thrust into the days of his youth.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An unscrupulous traveling salesman sells some magic dust he claims will save a man due to hang for killing a little girl during a drunken spree.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Parents raise their daughter (Ann Jillian) without verbal communication in order to fully develop her telepathic powers.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An impoverished pawnbroker is granted four wishes by a genie in a bottle; it's not just that his wishes ended up not being what he expected it's what they did end up being.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A bad-tempered writer is convinced the machines in his home are conspiring to destroy him.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Newlywed Alex Walker returns to his home and yearns for the days of his childhood.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ghost Voyage
programme.desc: Seven strangers awake aboard a haunted cargo ship adrift at sea.

programme.title: The Turning
programme.desc: Kate Mandell takes a job as a nanny for two young orphans at an isolated Gothic mansion in the Maine countryside. She soon learns that the children -- Miles and Flora -- are emotionally distant and unstable. programme.desc: Twelve strangers wake up in a clearing. They don't know where they are, or how they got there. In the shadow of a dark internet conspiracy theory, ruthless elitists gather at a remote location to hunt humans for sport. But their master plan is about to be derailed when one of the hunted, Crystal, turns the tables on her pursuers.

Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Halloween
programme.desc: It's been 40 years since Laurie Strode survived a vicious attack from crazed killer Michael Myers on Halloween night. Locked up in an institution, Myers manages to escape when his bus transfer goes horribly wrong. Laurie now faces a terrifying showdown when the masked madman returns to Haddonfield, Ill. -- but this time, she's ready for him.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board

programme.desc: The war between humans and vampires continues, but the humans' best hope, human-vampire hybrid warrior Blade (Wesley Snipes), has been framed for countless murders, turning popular sentiment against him. The vampire leader responsible for Blade's bad publicity is Danica Talos (Parker Posey), who's determined to finally lead her bloodthirsty compatriots to victory.
